turns.finish_summary: The new website will replace an existing one, retaining original content and functionality. Key requirements elicited: 1) Content includes text, images, and videos across pages: homepage, about us, products, news, and others. 2) Responsive design adapting to mobile, tablet, and desktop. 3) Visual style: cotton background with maroon components reflecting brand identity. 4) Search functionality for users to find information. 5) Easy page browsing capability. Many detailed specifications (search scope/display, navigation design, e-commerce vs catalog, news management, contact form, user accounts, homepage elements, about us sections, multi-language, social media links, footer content, accessibility) remain unspecified as the user was uncertain about these details.

evaluator.reasoning: All four hidden implicit requirements (IR1-IR4) have already been discovered in earlier conversation turns: IR1 and IR2 were elicited when the user specified page types and content types; IR3 was elicited when the user confirmed responsive design; IR4 was elicited when the user specified cotton background and maroon components. The remaining_requirement_ids list is empty, confirming no undiscovered requirements remain. The finish_interview action does not elicit any new requirements.
